---
pagetitle: "Programming with AI Support"
---

<!--
Session 3 starter deck.
Keep draft comments in place while building out this workshop block.
-->

# Programming with AI Support {layout="title" data-gp-kicker="WORKSHOP / BAMBERG" data-gp-section="Opening"}

<div class="gp-title-above">Workshop / Session 3</div>
<div class="gp-code">PROGRAMMING</div>
<div class="gp-title-below">with AI support</div>
<div class="gp-accent-bar" data-gp-underline="tag" aria-hidden="true"></div>

::: {.gp-subtitle}
<span>Thursday, March 19, 2026 · 13:00-15:30</span>
:::

::: {.gp-meta-grid}
::: {.gp-block}
<span class="gp-label">Thu</span> March 19, 2026 · 13:00-15:30
:::
::: {.gp-block}
<span class="gp-label">Part</span> Session 3 of 3
:::
::: {.gp-block}
<span class="gp-label">Focus</span> Prompting, debugging, notebooks, tooling
:::
:::


# Overview {layout="outline" data-gp-kicker="Workshop / Overview" data-gp-section="Plan"}

* This deck is the starter for the third workshop block.
* Use it for coding workflows, notebook exercises, and practical debugging examples.
* Keep comments in place while drafting so the structure remains easy to extend.
* The landing page still links only to the introductory deck for now.


# Schedule {layout="table" data-gp-kicker="Agenda / 01" data-gp-section="Plan"}

| Day | Time | Session | Focus |
|---|---|---|---|
| Wed, March 18, 2026 | 14:00-16:30 | Introductory Session | Overview of useful AI tools for research work |
| Thu, March 19, 2026 | 09:30-12:00 | Text Analysis | Structuring, analyzing, and interpreting texts with AI support |
| Thu, March 19, 2026 | 13:00-15:30 | Programming | Prompting, debugging, and notebook-based coding with AI support |


# Preparation {layout="bullets" data-gp-kicker="Setup / 02" data-gp-section="Plan"}

* A current browser is enough to access the workshop website and materials.
* The shared notebook lives at [../notebooks/workshop_notebook.ipynb](../notebooks/workshop_notebook.ipynb).
* This deck is built automatically with the rest of the workshop slides, even though the landing page does not link to it yet.


# Programming with AI Support {layout="divider" data-gp-kicker="Session 3 / Thu, March 19" data-gp-section="Session 3"}

Coding, debugging, notebooks

<!--
Add Session 3 slides here.
Draft work remains open.
-->


# Working Area {layout="bullets" data-gp-kicker="Session 3 / Starter" data-gp-section="Session 3"}

* Candidate topics: prompting in editors, debugging with models, refactoring, notebooks, and reproducibility.
* Keep examples concrete: traces, code diffs, tests, and failure cases.
* Add live-demo slides here rather than on the landing-page overview deck.


# Materials {layout="bullets" data-gp-kicker="Links / 03" data-gp-section="Material"}

* Website: [Workshop overview](../)
* Slides: [Introductory session deck](../slides/)
* Notebook: [Jupyter notebook](../notebooks/workshop_notebook.ipynb)


# Room and contact {layout="bullets" data-gp-kicker="Info / 04" data-gp-section="Material"}

* Instructor: Max Noichl
* Room: likely BAGSS seminar room
* Version date: March 17, 2026
